name: audit-clerk-skill
description: Audits the Clerk CLI source tree and proposes updates to the bundled `clerk-cli` skill so it stays in sync with the binary.
intent_triggers: use the audit clerk skill agent skill
run a workflow for audit clerk skill
help me with audit clerk skill
我需要處理 audit clerk skill 相關工作
幫我啟用 audit clerk skill 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 audit clerk skill
use audit clerk skill from cli

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the audit clerk skill skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
